scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/money build && bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/money typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/money test && bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/cli test
